_**User**_

Steps:
1. Read SuperAdmin.jsx from line 4024 to line 4190 to get the full `AsteriskLogsView` function
2. Create the new file with:

   - The full function body
   - `export default AsteriskLogsView;` at the bottom
3. Verify the file is self-contained (check what dependencies are used inside the function)

Do NOT modify SuperAdmin.jsx yet â€” just create the new file. Make sure to copy the code exactly, preserving all logic.
